description: Evaluate fit between base resume and job description, and generate structured clarification questions.

userStories.title: Evaluate Fit Node Implementation
userStories.description: As a job seeker, I want the system to use GPT-4o to evaluate my base resume against the job details, so that it can identify missing context and determine if clarification questions are needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: System successfully compares base resume and job description
Given the Child Sub-Graph has a populated base_resume and job_details
Then it invokes the LLM (gpt-4o) with a prompt containing both the resume and job description to evaluate fit

tasks.description: Define EvaluateFit prompt in prompts.yaml or node file
Create evaluate_fit_node.py and initialize the GPT-4o LLM call
Write a unit test to verify the node successfully accepts GraphState and calls the LLM

userStories.notes: Uses gpt-4o as specified in the TRD for heavy reasoning.

userStories.title: Enforce Clarification Question Schema
userStories.description: As a job seeker, I want the generated clarification questions to strictly follow the ClarificationQuestion schema, so that the Streamlit UI can render them flawlessly and safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: LLM outputs strictly typed clarification questions
Given the EvaluateFitNode identifies missing information
Then the output strictly conforms to the ClarificationQuestion Pydantic schema
and Then if the question type is multiple_choice, the options array MUST include the string 'Let LLM decide'

tasks.description: Implement ClarificationQuestion schema validation (including the 'Let LLM decide' constraint)
Bind the schema to the EvaluateFitNode LLM using with_structured_output
Write unit tests for schema parsing and the 'Let LLM decide' constraint

userStories.notes: Ensures the UI doesn't crash on malformed LLM questions.

userStories.title: Update State & Handle Routing
userStories.description: As a system orchestrator, I want the EvaluateFitNode to accurately update the ChildGraphState and set the status, so that the workflow either pauses for HITL clarification or proceeds to strategy generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Node correctly updates graph state based on findings
Then the node updates the state dictionary with the questions and sets status to NEEDS_CLARIFICATION
and When no clarification questions are needed
Then the node sets status to EVALUATING (or proceeds to next logical status) without adding questions

tasks.description: Update the node logic to return the correct state dictionary (clarification_questions and status)
Add routing logic to the child graph definition to handle NEEDS_CLARIFICATION interrupts
Write a unit test verifying state updates based on the presence of clarification questions

userStories.notes: Critical for LangGraph Checkpointer HITL interrupts.
